# Kodable.ai

> A small studio that uses AI to scale small local businesses across Spain. We build fast websites and AI agents that answer customers 24/7. Bilingual (English / Español). Free, no-pressure consultation; real people who answer after launch.

## Services
- [Websites](https://kodable.ai/en/services/websites): Fast, AI-built sites that show up when people search nearby and turn a curious visitor into a booking.
- [AI Agents](https://kodable.ai/en/services/ai-agents): A friendly assistant that answers customers, takes bookings and handles reception on WhatsApp and your site, 24/7.

## Key pages
- [All services](https://kodable.ai/en/services)
- [Pricing](https://kodable.ai/en/pricing): Clear prices for websites (pay once or all-in monthly) and AI agents, VAT included.
- [Builder or agency? An honest comparison](https://kodable.ai/en/comparativa)
- [Work samples](https://kodable.ai/en/casos)
- [FAQ](https://kodable.ai/en/faq)
- [Contact](https://kodable.ai/en/contact)
